heroHeadline: Spotify's 20th Anniversary Confirms Bad Bunny #2 All-Time Most-Streamed Artist; Un Verano Sin Ti Is #1 Album in History
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, a historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance, and Grammy Album of the Year. On April 23, Spotify's 20th anniversary rankings confirmed Bad Bunny as the #2 all-time most-streamed artist (behind Taylor Swift) and Un Verano Sin Ti as the most-streamed album in Spotify history. Adidas x Bad Bunny officially revealed the Stone Slide Pack (5 Puerto Rico cave-inspired colorways, summer 2026) on April 15–17. The "Tracking Bad Bunny" DDB Latina Puerto Rico campaign won the Webby Award for Best Fan Engagement (Apr 21). Spotify monthly listeners: 103.9M. European leg begins May 22, 2026 in Barcelona.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, Pollstar, Bloomberg, NPR, Remezcla, SoleRetriever, Deadline, Variety, and major media
